prompt: make the photo like its taken at midnight, with galaxy visible in the center
remarks: the moon should be in a different position?
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform the scene to portray a deep midnight ambiance. Significantly darken the sky and landscape, adjusting the lighting and colors to reflect a true night setting. In the central upper portion of the sky, directly above the tree, make a vibrant, photorealistic galaxy (Milky Way) clearly visible.
objects: Vibrant, photorealistic galaxy (Milky Way) in the central upper sky, directly above the tree
